# Reel Action Digital

> Organic social media management and short-form video content production for businesses across New Zealand. Based in Tauranga, Bay of Plenty.

Reel Action Digital (rad) is a social media content specialist focused on organic content: content that earns views and engagement without paid advertising.

## Pages

- [Home](https://reelactiondigital.com/): Overview, approach, and client results
- [Services](https://reelactiondigital.com/services): Package pricing and what's included
- [About](https://reelactiondigital.com/about): Who we are and how we work
- [Contact](https://reelactiondigital.com/contact): Book a free 15-minute call

## Services

- **Social media management**: End-to-end retainer management of Instagram, Facebook and TikTok — strategy, content production, editing, captions, scheduling, and reporting
- **Short-form video production**: Reels and short-form video produced and edited for organic social performance
- **Photography**: Commercial photography for use across social media and digital marketing
- **Custom packages**: Tailored content packages for businesses with specific requirements

## Pricing

All prices in NZD, excluding GST.

- **Social media (Everything) — $1,899/month**: Full service. Monthly half-day video shoot, editing, captions, scheduling and reporting across Instagram, Facebook and TikTok. Up to 4 posts per week, Mon-Thu at peak times. Includes page monitoring, enquiry management and account setup. 4-month minimum, then month-by-month, quarterly, bi-annual or annual.
- **Social media (You Shoot) — $959/month**: You film to a supplied shoot guide with word-for-word hooks, talking points and camera angles. We edit, caption, schedule and report. Up to 4 posts per week across Instagram, Facebook and TikTok. 4-month minimum.
- **Reels one-off shoot — $799**: 10 edited short-form videos, each up to 30 seconds, from a single shoot day. Up to 3 hours on-site across two locations, travel included. 2 revisions per video, 5 total. No ongoing commitment.
- **Photography — from $399**: Half-day or full-day commercial, people and automotive photography. Minimum 10 edited photos per session. Retouching, compositing, multiple locations, drone and B-cam available.
- **Custom service**: Tailored packages built from individual features. Priced on enquiry.

## Frequently asked

- **How much does it cost?** Retainers start at $959/month ex GST for the self-shoot package and $1,899/month ex GST for full service. A one-off Reels shoot day is $799 ex GST. Photography starts at $399 ex GST.
- **What platforms do you manage?** Instagram, Facebook and TikTok.
- **Do you work outside Tauranga?** Yes. rad works with clients nationwide across New Zealand.
- **What is the minimum commitment?** 4 months on the monthly retainer packages. One-off shoots have no ongoing commitment.
- **Do you run paid advertising?** No. rad is organic-first: content earns its reach through the platform algorithm rather than paid spend.

## Who we work with

Businesses and professionals across New Zealand looking to build an organic social media presence. Current and past clients span finance, electrical trades, and other service industries.

## Our approach

Every account gets a content formula built around what earns reach for that specific business and audience. We lead with organic content because it proves what works before any paid spend follows.

## Location

Tauranga, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand. Serving clients nationwide.
